system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response:
As of June 2024, Will Smith is continuing his career in Hollywood following his return after the 2022 Oscars incident. He recently starred in **"Bad Boys: Ride or Die"** (released June 2024), reprising his role as Mike Lowrey alongside Martin Lawrence. The film has performed well at the box office, signaling a successful comeback.

Looking ahead, Smith is attached to several projects, including a sequel to **"I Am Legend"** (with Michael B. Jordan) and a potential fourth "Bad Boys" film, though official release dates have not been announced. He is also involved in producing various film and television projects through his company, Westbrook Inc.

No major controversies or career changes have been reported recently, and Smith appears focused on rebuilding his public image and continuing his work in entertainment.
